textByHashes.73dbc48e9e87f9eb25a2753fa68eccd9f2b31cf2: I hear you have something of interest to me.
textByHashes.a6805eb338ebe6d30910dd0e65c4571540892851: Oh, they are quite safe. You'll be seeing them soon, although not Arthur. He's a bit...busy at the moment.
textByHashes.db56bf3af07cd44836c300cd09579d3131a4df9c: You have guessed correctly that I'm responsible for that.
textByHashes.058077f648b573f47c3baca33426b49424f55cb0: I suppose I can live with that fool Merlin being loose for the sake of my son.
textByHashes.c921c26018998aee67ad6dce420376f74283c2e7: Setting him free won't be easy though.
textByHashes.b3e10c2edff1732ad9c9d3f67ad67c507e6c543b: You will need to find a magic symbol as close to the crystal as you can find.
textByHashes.30290a1a45ba80fce866939f48e5ea5647ec0bff: You will then need to drop some bats' bones on the magic symbol while holding a lit black candle.
textByHashes.9eeded9b2276e0e316ec9a5c0c30efc2ff64712d: This will summon a mighty spirit named Thrantax.
textByHashes.565f19c856e56990cc201be711ef06a9b13d7083: You will need to bind him with magic words.
textByHashes.9acab76d18e908d30b07d266226a22e2e3b3c6af: Then you will need the sword Excalibur with which the spell was bound in order to shatter the crystal.
textByHashes.ad2bfcfcc50192959b8ed1d9d211dbc5f606d8f1: The lady of the lake has it. I don't know if she'll give it to you though, she can be rather temperamental.
textByHashes.7f0c07f9497e779f74f5253f0e5f06b0575d4033: You will find the magic words at the base of one of the chaos altars.
textByHashes.640ee5e8a8f4d84951404e7ecc91f62f61880ac6: Which chaos altar I cannot remember.
